name: The Clampetts
title: Bally-Hoo Bucket

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Meridion's Passage
abilities.text: Once per activation. After resolving an action where this model moves through the centerline, make a Tide marker anywhere on the centerline.

abilities.name: Offboard Motor
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, increase the distance this model moves by up to +4".

triggers.name: Wallowing
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Staggered) token.

triggers.name: Gut Feeling
triggers.text: Once per activation. Choose a suit. Target may discard a card of the chosen suit. If it does not, declare this action again.

actions.name: Drawn to the Sea
actions.effects: Move the target up to 6" toward a piece of terrain or Tide marker in its LoS.

triggers.name: From the Depths
triggers.text: Target must be within 1" of a Tide marker. Target is dealt 3 damage.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Waves Crash
actions.effects: Make a Tide marker within range. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Lucky Lure
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of the made marker gains a Drift token.

triggers.name: Claimed by the Deep
triggers.text: Remove any one marker touching a (aura) generated by this action.

extraction_notes: The 'Claimed by the Deep' trigger text includes '(aura)' which may refer to the aura of the Tide marker, kept as written
